sglang.title: [Diffusion] Keep FastHunyuan VAE resident on high-memory GPUs
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR fixes: FastHunyuan's automatic high-memory policy still selected vae for layerwise offload on B200-class GPUs, even though keeping the VAE resident is practical there and avoids extra VAE decode/copy overhead.
Changes:

Keep FastHunyuan VAE GPU-resident when selected GPUs have at lea

sglang.title: [AMD] Fix garbled unquantized Qwen3-30B-A3B output on ROCm/aiter where the aiter CK fused-MoE falls back to Triton with pre-shuffled weights
sglang.author: JessicaJiang-123
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Co-authored-with: @XinyuJiangCMU
Motivation

On ROCm (gfx950, MI350X/MI355X) with SGLANG_USE_AITER=1, bf16 Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B emits garbage whenever tensor parallelism shards the MoE intermediate to a size the aiter CK kernel cannot handle (tp=8 -> 768 / 8 = 96). tp=1 (intermediate 768) is fine.
SGL

sglang.title: [AMD] Optimize o_proj gemm and attn output rope performance
sglang.author: kkHuang-amd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation


The MLA output / q / kv projection w8a8-block FP8 GEMM uses the Triton kernel. apply_w8a8_block_fp8_linear selects triton_gemm_a8w8_blockscale for the MLA projection shapes (they are in the hard-coded use_aiter_triton_gemm_w8a8_tuned_gfx950 list). On gfx950 + HIP≥7.2 the CK bpreshuffle

sglang.title: [diffusion] CI: remove flaky layerwise offload diffusion case
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Remove the dedicated layerwise_offload diffusion server testcase.
Drop its perf baseline, consistency threshold, and component-accuracy skip entry so no orphan config remains.

Rationale
The case is a flaky perf gate on some runners. ZImage coverage remains through zimage_image_t2i and rela

sglang.title: [diffusion] Shard HunyuanVideo text tokens under SP
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

add an optional varlen Ulysses all-to-all path for uneven local sequence lengths
shard HunyuanVideo text tokens after txt_in when SP is enabled with ring_degree=1
run HunyuanVideo double/single stream blocks on local text shards instead of replicated text tokens

Benchmark
Remote H100 bench

sglang.title: [mem_cache][5/N] refactor: extract host KV cache base layer into pool_host package
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
First PR of the pool_host phase of the mem_cache refactor (issue #25371). Sibling of the completed allocator series (#26675, #26676).
memory_pool_host.py is a ~2960-line module holding the host-side KV cache base class, shared allocation helpers, and every concrete host pool (MHA / MLA /

sglang.title: [AMD] Fix no-op dtype cast in _topk_ids_logical_to_physical_dynamic on HIP
sglang.author: rbrugaro-amd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Description
PR #22985 ("[AMD] Support eplb for moriep") added HIP dtype preservation to both static and dynamic dispatch functions, but the dynamic function has a bug: topk_ids is overwritten with the int64 lookup result from partial_logical_to_all_physical_map before the cast, so topk_ids.to(topk_i

sglang.title: Clean up startup log noise
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:

Remove noisy startup logs from custom allreduce v2, speculative decoding, and finalized token capacity handling.
Keep the SM100 CUTLASS fallback behavior while removing the repeated startup sentence.

Test Plan:

python3 -m compileall -q python/sglang/srt/distributed/device_communicators/c

sglang.title: [CI] Remove deprecated test/srt legacy CI setup
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
test/srt/run_suite.py was the legacy CI runner. It has been superseded by the registry-based test/run_suite.py (auto-discovers tests under test/registered/) and carried an in-code deprecation notice:

DEPRECATION NOTICE: The folder test/srt should be deprecated as soon as possible. Migrat

sglang.title: [mtp] add rejection sampling for speculative decoding
sglang.author: liyucheng09
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add classic reject sampling (RS) in Eagle speculative decoding.
The current pipeline of Eagle speculative decoding employ greedy sampling in both predicting draft tokens and target verification.
Use classic reject sampling means to use actual draft prob distribution for sampling draft tok

sglang.title: Sort pyproject dependency lists
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Sort dependency lists in python pyproject variants alphabetically by package name.
Add a comment asking future editors to keep dependency lists sorted.

Test Plan

Parsed the touched TOML files with python3/tomllib.
Verified parsed TOML content changes are reorder-only against HEAD.
Verifie

sglang.title: [Fix] MM pool GPU alloc with base_gpu_id
sglang.author: Zhangpch2021
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

MmItemMemoryPool always allocates its GPU memory pool on device cuda:0 (via device="cuda"), ignoring base_gpu_id in server_args. When base_gpu_id > 0 (e.g., multiple instances on the same machine), this causes the memory pool to reside on the wrong GPU, leading to incorrect CUDA IPC beha

sglang.title: [AMD][bugfix] Place TBO cuda-graph num_token_non_padded buffer on model devices
sglang.author: karverma-amd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
TboCudaGraphRunnerPlugin preallocates a persistent _tbo_children_num_token_non_padded buffer with a bare torch.zeros((2,), dtype=torch.int32), which leaves it on CPU.
ForwardBatch.num_token_non_padded is contractually a tensor on the model device (ForwardBatch.compute does .to(device, ...

sglang.title: Remove threading atexit monkey patch
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:

Remove the global threading._register_atexit monkey patch from the HTTP server and Engine entrypoints.
Let CPython keep its normal threading atexit hooks, including ThreadPoolExecutor shutdown handling.

Tests:

python3 -m py_compile python/sglang/srt/entrypoints/http_server.py python/sgla

sglang.title: Add project rule: prefer msgspec.Struct over dataclasses
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Adds a project-wide rule banning new uses of dataclasses.dataclass (and attrs) in favor of msgspec.Struct. Rationale captured in the rule:

Stricter typing — msgspec.Struct enforces field types and works better with strict type checkers.
Future Rust migration — Struct maps cleanly onto Ru

sglang.title: Fix Qwen layered string image paths
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Handle Qwen-Image-Layered image_path when it is passed as a string instead of a list.
Keep the existing list input behavior by selecting the first path.
Add lightweight unit coverage for string, list, and empty-list path handling.

Why
image_path can reach the layered stage as a plain strin

sglang.title: Validate OpenAI sampling dimensions
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Reject malformed or non-positive OpenAI size values before building sampling params.
Reject non-positive width, height, num_frames, num_inference_steps, and num_outputs_per_prompt at the OpenAI boundary.
Add lightweight unit coverage for malformed size, non-positive size, and non-positive f

sglang.title: fix(anthropic): handle mid-conversation system messages
sglang.author: VarV0id
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
Claude Code and other clients send system messages mid-conversation (after user/assistant messages), which violates Anthropic's API spec. This causes 400 errors:
1 validation error: {'type': 'literal_error', 'loc': ('body', 'messages', N, 'role'), 'msg': 'Input should be ...'}

Additionally,

sglang.title: [Tiny] Fast fix for #28809
sglang.author: Oasis-Git
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
#28809 folds the EAGLE-target fix into the single unified condition the BCG/PCG consolidation (#23906) left in PrefillCudaGraphRunner.init, which applies one rule to every backend. Pre-#23906 the two runners differed:
BreakableCudaGraphRunner (BCG, now Backend.BREAKABLE):
return_hidden -> FULL; EAGL

vllm.author: mawong-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes the e2e core test group. Cascade attention is only supported on the FLASH_ATTN and FLASHINFER backends, neither of which is currently supported on AMD.
Test Plan
pytest -v -s v1/e2e/general --ignore v1/e2e/general/test_async_scheduling.py
Test Result
The test group passes. It i

vllm.title: Revert "Fix Stale Encoder Cache After Weight Update"
vllm.author: SumanthRH
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reverts #45093
The decision to reset prefix cache should be left to the user. We should not be silently resetting prefix cache after every weight update
I'm not sure about encoder cache though (i.e is it typical to reset encoder cache for multimodal async RL?)

vllm.title: [Perf] Optimize Qwen3-VL multi-video prompt processing
vllm.author: Sirius29
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Replace text-level prompt expansion (decode + string replace + re-tokenize) with token-level replacement in _call_hf_processor.
Co-authored-by: DeepSeek
Purpose
Optimize _call_hf_processor in Qwen3-VL for multi-video inputs.
Problem: Each video's expanded token IDs were decoded to text and
inserted

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Guard model_config access in _log_compilation_config
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
_log_compilation_config() in VllmBackend crashes with AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'model' when model_config is None
This test creates a VllmConfig with only compilation_config set, and leaves model_config set to None
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/tests

vllm.title: Stop setting CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES internally in vLLM, add device_ids arg
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR changes the way vLLM interacts with the CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES (CVD) environment variable:

With this PR vLLM no longer sets CVD to control which GPU a worker uses
This PR adds a --device-ids argument so that users don't need to set

This has a few benefits:

vLLM currently does not support th

vllm.title: [ROCm] [Bugfix] Bugfix ROCm Sparse Indexer
vllm.author: tjtanaa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Cause: PR #44577 exposed a ROCm AITER sparse-indexer bug. The packed KV layout makes per-block strides large enough that block_id * stride can exceed 32-bit range.
Fix: widened the physical block id to tl.int64 before cache-stride arithmetic in both indexer cache insert and gather paths
Erro

vllm.title: [Frontend] Report cache usage in Anthropic /v1/messages API
vllm.author: zhangshuoming990105
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Populate cache_read_input_tokens and cache_creation_input_tokens in the Anthropic Messages API response, which were previously always None. Aligns input_tokens semantics with the Anthropic contract.
Fixes #33923
Key changes

Fix input_tokens semantics: Anthropic defines total_input = input_t

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Move extract_layer_index back inside is_v32 guard
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Pretty straightforward - #45895 removed the if self.is_v32 check, which broke LongcatFlash. This PR brings it back
Claude summary:
Details
## Summary

Commit ab66606 (#45895) moved extract_layer_index(prefix) from inside the if self.is_v32 guard to unconditional execution in DeepseekV2MLAAttention._

add an opt-in VLLM_USE_PACKED_HMA_KV_CACHE path for multi-group HMA KV cache packing
keep the existing DeepSeek V4 packed path unchanged
register packed HMA offload as one canonical backing tensor with one full-row ref per KV group, preserving the packed topology for CPU offload

vllm.title: [KV-Offloading] : Expose CPU cache usage metric

Purpose
Add vllm:kv_offload_cpu_cache_usage_perc metric to export CPU cache usage percent. The naming and the semantics is designed to match the gpu counter part vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc
This PR also refactors the build_metric_definitions function to move it into the OffloadingManager.

Add

vllm.author: ivanium
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Two related optimizations to the MooncakeStoreConnector prefix-lookup path. Both reduce the cost of moving block hashes around, which becomes acute when the model's block_size is much larger than the connector's hash_block_size.
1. Compact chunk-hash keys
When block_size > hash_block_size, a

vllm.title: [SimpleCPUOffloadConnector] PCP + DCP support
vllm.author: jonathanc-n
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add PCP + DCP support by scaling kv block sizes by pcp_world_size * dcp_world_size. Straightforward changes due to the simple connector using the KVCacheCoordinator which already properly handles context parallelism for kv caching
Claude was used for creating tests.

vllm.title: [Perf] Skip/shrink all_token_ids copy in scheduler for non-async and V2 runner
vllm.author: amanchugh89
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
CachedRequestData.all_token_ids is read in exactly one place — the V1 GPU
model runner, and only when async scheduling is enabled
(vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py, gated on self.use_async_scheduling).
There it restores a resumed request's output tokens after a gap step:
if self.use_async_

vllm.title: [Render] Add reasoning/tool parsing to /derender + fix byte-fallback FFFD
vllm.author: aoshen02
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Merges the reasoning/tool-call parsing from PR #45045 and fixes the byte-fallback U+FFFD regression in derender logprobs.
Reasoning & tool call parsing (from #45045)

New build_chat_message() in serve/utils/chat_message_builder.py — single source of truth shared by coupled chat path and /der

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix stale doc URL and docstring module path
vllm.author: umut-polat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Two small fixes:


envs.py: The VLLM_PORT error message links to en/stable/serving/env_vars.html which returns 404. Updated to the correct path en/latest/configuration/env_vars.html.


tool_parsers/init.py: The docstring example references vllm.tool_parsers.kimi_k2_parser but the actual module is vl

vllm.title: [Core] Ensure memory is pinned prior to async h2d copy
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
To avoid possible gpu/cpu stream syncs.
See for example #45074.
Also: Generalize async_tensor_h2d utility function and standardize how is_pin_memory_available() is used.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix NVFP4/OCP MX MoE emulation
vllm.author: mawong-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes an issue in the NVFP4/OCP MX MoE emulation code paths caused by #42120.
In that PR, TritonExperts.apply in vllm/model_executor/layers/fused_moe/experts/triton_moe.py was modified to call moe_kernel_quantize_input on the activations if TritonExperts.expects_unquantized_inputs ==

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Model Runner V2] Fix min_tokens off-by-one in the V2 GPU sampler
vllm.author: Sunt-ing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
min_tokens=N should let EOS through at output index N (the N+1-th token), as the V1 MinTokensLogitsProcessor does. The V2 GPU sampler releases it one step late, so min_tokens=N silently forces N+1 non-EOS tokens. This is the default path for mainstream archs (Llama, Qwen3, Mistral, ...).
The

vllm.title: Fix memory pointer overflow in Mamba state buffers
vllm.author: srajabos
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Device memory addresses can exceed the signed int64 maximum value
(2^63-1), causing pointer overflow errors when creating Mamba state
buffers for copy operations.

Use torch.uint64 unconditionally for src_ptrs and dst_ptrs to support
the full 64-bit unsigned address space (max 2^64-1) on all platfor
